it is a wet glue and cold glue labeling machine ,for application paper labels on glass, Plastic tin can.

Provide high-quality solutions for diverse packaging needs

NP-GL Cold Glue Labeling Machine

The NP-GL automatic cold glue labeling machine, often referred to as the wet glue labeling machine, it is application for paper labels and paste glue on labels, then sticking on bottles.It is one of the popular label applicator for food industry and medicine bottles and jars.It stands as a dedicated inline industrial label applicator crafted for the precise application of bottle labels. This machine is especially adept at handling round bottles, making it an ideal labeling solution for a wide array of round bottle types. Its widespread application across food, pharmaceutical, and daily chemical industries attests to its versatility and efficiency in meeting diverse labeling needs. With its specific design for round bottles, it ensures accurate label placement, enhancing product presentation and compliance with industry standards.

Inquiry US
Catalgoue Download

Why Choose a Wet Glue Labeling Machine ?

When considering labeling solutions for small and medium batch production, a wet glue (cold glue) labeling machine stands out for several compelling reasons:

  • Consistency and Quality: Wet glue machines spread glue evenly on labels, ensuring a smooth, wrinkle-free application. The result? A polished, professional appearance with clean, filament-like glue stripes—no peeling, no bubbling, and labels that stay firmly in place.
  • Enhanced Efficiency: By fully automating the processes of paper separation, gluing, and application, wet glue machines drastically reduce the hands-on time required compared to manual labeling. This means higher throughput with less labor, making it much easier to keep pace with batch production needs.
  • Adaptability: These machines excel in flexibility—perfect for various types of round bottles and jars often found in food, beverage (such as wine), and pharmaceutical industries. Adjustments between product sizes are quick and intuitive, requiring only minor tweaks without the hassle of swapping out parts.
  • Compact and Versatile: Thanks to their space-saving design, wet glue labeling machines can easily be integrated into existing lines or used as standalone units. Their mobility and compact footprint make them suitable even for facilities with limited space.
  • User-Friendly Operation: Features like touchscreen controls (often supporting multiple languages) allow operators to adjust parameters and monitor functions with ease. This helps streamline setup, boosts production management, and reduces the learning curve for new users.
  • Low Cost of Consumables: For small and medium batches, wet glue machines use economical paper labels and standard glue. This can result in significant savings compared to self-adhesive labels or shrink sleeves, helping to stretch budgets further.

In summary, for businesses looking for an efficient, cost-effective solution to label small and medium runs—without compromising on quality or versatility—the wet glue labeling machine is a rock-solid choice. It brings together efficiency, adaptability, and professional presentation, all packed into a rugged, low-maintenance machine.

One of the standout benefits of using a wet glue (cold glue) labeling machine is its cost-effectiveness, especially when working with traditional paper labels. Paper labels used with wet glue are generally far more economical than self-adhesive alternatives, making them a smart choice for companies aiming to reduce labeling expenses.

1. The entire machine is made of 304/316 grade stainless steel material, which meets GMP standards

2. Equipped with a Siemens touch screen, the operation interface is friendly and easy to set. The main functions include: product counting, output equipment, multiple sets of parameters, equipment status monitoring, automatic shutdown of equipment faults, alarm prompts, etc

3. Automatic photoelectric detection, without bottle or label, automatic calibration or alarm automatic detection function, to prevent leakage and waste of labels

4. It can work independently or form an automated production line with bottom filling machine and bottom capping machine

5. For containers and labels of similar sizes, there is no need to replace any parts, and production can start with slight adjustments.

6. Servo motor and PLC control, high precision labeling machine

7. Optional ribbon coding machine and inkjet printer, which can print production batch number, production date, and other information for labeling and inkjet integration

1Labeling capacity（pcs/min）60-150 pcs/min (Related to the material and label size)
2Labeling accuracy（mm）±1.0mm
3Bottle sizeOutside diameterφ30-φ100mm （H）20-150mm
4Label size(L)20-200mm（H）20-140mm
5Air pressure5KG/cm2
5Power supplyAC220V 50Hz/60Hz 1800W

Adjusting Glue Thickness and Label Application

Flexibility is built right into the NP-GL cold glue labeling machine, allowing operators to fine-tune glue application and accommodate a wide range of labeling needs. Adjusting the glue thickness is straightforward thanks to the high-precision copper glue box paired with a stainless steel roller system. This design makes it easy to control the amount of adhesive applied—just a simple tweak ensures a consistent, even glue layer that helps prevent both leakage and unnecessary waste.
The specialized rubber rollers, engineered for durability and minimal wear, further enhance glue uniformity across every label. For those handling frequent changeovers or multiple product lines, the label box is quick to adjust to different sizes, letting you switch label dimensions with minimal downtime.
And for optimal efficiency, the glue pump supports continuous glue circulation, ensuring that glue flows only as needed and can be easily regulated to match specific application requirements. This combination of smart controls, precise adjustments, and adaptable parts ensures that whether you’re working with tiny pharmaceutical vials or larger condiment jars, you’ll achieve clean, professional labeling every time.

Whether you’re looking to enhance your existing production line or starting a new project, we have the right solutions for you. Our machines are equipped with advanced features to maintain product quality and minimize waste. Additionally, our knowledgeable team is always available to provide expert guidance and support.
